name: Stone Cursed
languages: the languages it knew in life

traits.name: Cunning Opportunist
traits.text: The stone cursed has advantage on the attack rolls of opportunity attack.

traits.name: False Appearance
traits.text: If the stone cursed is motionless at the start of combat, it has advantage on its initiative roll. Moreover, if a creature hasn't observed the stone cursed move or act, that creature must succeed on a 18 Intelligence (Investigation) check to discern that the stone cursed isn't a statue.

traits.name: Unusual Nature
traits.text: The stone cursed doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.
